mapper.select: SELECT date AS date_str, COALESCE(SUM(duration), 0) AS value FROM study_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND date >= #{since} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY date ORDER BY date
SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date_str, COUNT(*) AS value FROM note_note WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_at >= #{since} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY DATE(created_at)
SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date_str, COUNT(*) AS value FROM todo_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_at >= #{since} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY DATE(created_at)
SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date_str, COUNT(*) AS value FROM reading_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_at >= #{since} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY DATE(created_at)

SELECT id, title AS title, LEFT(content, 200) AS snippet, updated_at AS date_str FROM note_note WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) LIMIT 10

SELECT id, COALESCE(title, '') AS title, LEFT(content, 200) AS snippet, date AS date_str FROM diary_entry WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) LIMIT 10

SELECT id, title, LEFT(content, 200) AS snippet, created_at AS date_str FROM todo_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) LIMIT 10

SELECT id, subject AS title, LEFT(content, 200) AS snippet, date AS date_str FROM study_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND (subject LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) LIMIT 10

SELECT id, title, LEFT(description, 200) AS snippet, created_at AS date_str FROM bookmark_url WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR url LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) LIMIT 10

SELECT id, book_title AS title, LEFT(notes, 200) AS snippet, created_at AS date_str FROM reading_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND (book_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR notes LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) LIMIT 10

SELECT id, name AS title, CONCAT(type, ' - ', FORMAT(size, 0), 'B') AS snippet, created_at AS date_str FROM file_resource WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') LIMIT 10

SELECT id, name AS title, LEFT(goal, 200) AS snippet, created_at AS date_str FROM study_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR goal LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) LIMIT 10
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(duration), 0) FROM study_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
